title: How to Request a New Laptop or Peripheral Hardware
text:
Q: How do I request a new laptop or peripheral hardware?
A: To request a new laptop or peripheral hardware, please follow these steps: Step 1: Access the IT Helpdesk portal by navigating to the company intranet and clicking on the 'IT Helpdesk' link. Step 2: Log in using your company credentials (username and password). Step 3: Once logged in, locate the 'Hardware Requests' section on the dashboard. Step 4: Click on 'New Request' and select 'Laptop' or 'Peripheral Hardware' from the dropdown menu. Step 5: Fill out the required fields, including your department, the reason for the request, and any specific hardware specifications you may need. Step 6: If requesting peripheral hardware, specify the type (e.g., mouse, keyboard, monitor) and any preferred brands. Step 7: Review your request for accuracy and click 'Submit'. Step 8: You will receive a confirmation email with a ticket number; please keep this for your records. Step 9: The IT department will review your request and contact you for any further information or to confirm approval. Step 10: If you have any urgent needs or issues, feel free to reach out to the IT Helpdesk via the chat feature on the portal.
